ks1.objective: Bounce the ball into the hoop so your partner can catch it.

lks2.objective: Develop throwing weight and tracking — bounce the ball into the hoop for your partner to read and catch.
successCriteria: Pair improves their count round on round

uks2.objective: Combine accuracy with deception — choose to help (cooperative) or trouble (competitive) your partner with bounce angle and power.
successCriteria: Cooperative mode: aim for centre of hoop
Competitive mode: vary angle and pace

space.description: Open space — pairs spaced out with the hoop on the floor between them.

steps: Pair up. Place the hoop on the floor between the players.
One partner bounces the ball into the hoop for the other to catch after the bounce.
Count how many successful throw-and-catches each pair can make in a set time.
Cooperative version: highest pair score wins.
Competitive version: bounce the ball into the hoop so your partner CAN'T catch it — vary angle and pace.
questions: What helped you catch the ball successfully after the bounce?
How did you work with your partner to improve your score?

step.space: Add a throwing line (must stand behind it)
step.equipment: Use different size balls — softer for less skilled, smaller for more challenge
step.people: Play in groups of 3 or 4 — rotate catcher each turn
